selection_reason: WP4 advisory role hardening advanced to source-contract readiness; WP5 must first formalize DemoMutationEnvelope or map existing mlde_demo_applier records before any controlled Demo bandit or mutation work can be considered.
preconditions: WP2 PIT dataset manifest source contract complete
WP3 registry serving parity source contract complete
WP4 advisory role hardening source contract complete
runtime/order-capable work remains blocked by expired standing Demo authorization
controlled Demo bandit runtime remains blocked until DemoMutationEnvelope and real reward ledger prerequisites exist
dirty worktree classified; unrelated memory/* and non-WP5 ML dirty files left unstaged
acceptance: Define demo_mutation_envelope_v1 source contract with stable hash helper, builder, extractor, validator, and tests.

Envelope records engine_mode, source proposal or recommendation id, source payload hash, application type, target, previous snapshot, proposed patch, bounded delta, max delta policy, governance verdict, rollback handle, IPC response hash/status, post-change review, proof linkage, and no-authority answers.

Countability is fail-closed: applied, non-empty, non-dedupe, non-dry-run, concrete bounded delta, rollback, governance, post-change review, and proof linkage are all required before effective_learning_countable can be true.
Empty patch, dedupe, dry-run, skipped, failed, non-demo, live, live_demo, missing bound, missing rollback, missing proof, or missing review rows remain audit-only or invalid.
Validator rejects nested/camelCase authority and non-demo scope aliases including secretAccess, mainnetAccess, candidateScope=live, and candidateEngineMode=live_demo.

Map existing mlde_demo_applier _record_application inputs into the envelope under payload.demo_mutation_envelope without changing SQL schema, fetch, patch calculation, dedupe fingerprint, IPC params, status semantics, or live-candidate behavior.
Raw IPC response details are represented only by hash/status inside the envelope.
No bandit runtime, runtime mutation, DB action, exchange contact, provider call, order/probe, Cost Gate change, deploy, live, or mainnet action is performed.
kill_gates: STOP_TEST if focused tests, compile, or diff-check fail
STOP_EVIDENCE if envelope can become countable without concrete bound, review, proof, or rollback
STOP_BOUNDARY if runtime/order/private/provider/MCP/live action is required
STOP_LOSS_CONTROL after WP5 if next work requires fresh standing Demo loss-control envelope
